records.question: Which stations in Palo Alto have at least 23 docks, a latitude of at most 37.443988, a longitude exactly at -122.164759, and were installed on 8/14/2013?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.id FROM station
WHERE station.dock_count >= 23 AND station.city = 'Palo Alto' AND station.lat <= 37.443988 AND station.long = -122.164759 AND station.installation_date = '8/14/2013'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT station.id
FROM station
WHERE station.dock_count >= 23
AND station.city = 'Palo Alto'
AND station.lat <= 37.443988
AND station.long = -122.164759
AND station.installation_date = '8/14/2013'

records.question: Which stations named San Antonio Caltrain Station in Mountain View have at least 23 docks, a longitude of -122.10675800000001, and status updates on or after 2015-06-02 13:50:03?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.id FROM station
JOIN status ON station.id = status.station_id
WHERE station.name = 'San Antonio Caltrain Station' AND status.time >= '2015-06-02 13:50:03' AND station.city = 'Mountain View' AND station.dock_count >= 23 AND station.long = -122.10675800000001
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT station.id
FROM station
INNER JOIN status ON station.id = status.station_id
WHERE station.name = 'San Antonio Caltrain Station'
AND station.city = 'Mountain View'
AND station.dock_count >= 23
AND station.long = -122.10675800000001
AND status.time >= '2015-06-02 13:50:03'

records.question: Which stations were installed exactly on 8/6/2013?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.id FROM station
WHERE station.installation_date = '8/6/2013'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT id 
FROM station 
WHERE installation_date = '2013-08-06'

records.question: Which stations named San Jose City Hall in San Jose have exactly 15 docks, a latitude of 37.337391, an installation date of 8/6/2013, and a longitude of at most -121.886995?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.id FROM station
WHERE station.long <= -121.886995 AND station.city = 'San Jose' AND station.lat = 37.337391 AND station.dock_count = 15 AND station.installation_date = '8/6/2013' AND station.name = 'San Jose City Hall'

SELECT id 
FROM station 
WHERE long <= -121.886995 
AND city = 'San Jose'

AND installation_date = '8/6/2013'

records.question: What stations named Mechanics Plaza (Market at Battery) in San Francisco, installed on 8/25/2013, have at least 19 docks and are located at longitude no less than -122.399051 and latitude no more than 37.7913?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.id FROM station
WHERE station.city = 'San Francisco' AND station.long >= -122.399051 AND station.lat <= 37.7913 AND station.name = 'Mechanics Plaza (Market at Battery)' AND station.installation_date = '8/25/2013' AND station.dock_count >= 19

FROM station
WHERE station.city = 'San Francisco'

AND station.lat <= '37.7913'
AND station.name = 'Mechanics Plaza (Market at Battery)'
AND station.installation_date = '8/25/2013'
AND station.dock_count >= 19

records.question: Which stations named Clay at Battery currently have at least 9 docks available?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.id FROM station
JOIN status ON station.id = status.station_id
WHERE status.docks_available >= 9 AND station.name = 'Clay at Battery'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT station.id
FROM station
INNER JOIN status ON station.id = status.station_id
WHERE station.name = 'Clay at Battery' AND status.docks_available >= 9

records.question: What stations in Redwood City installed on 8/12/2013 have latitude at most 37.481758, longitude at least -122.226904, dock count at most 15, and on or before 2015-06-02 13:00:01 had exactly 3 bikes available and no more than 12 docks available?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.id FROM station
JOIN status ON station.id = status.station_id
WHERE station.lat <= 37.481758 AND status.bikes_available = 3 AND station.city = 'Redwood City' AND station.dock_count <= 15 AND status.docks_available <= 12 AND status.time <= '2015-06-02 13:00:01' AND station.installation_date = '8/12/2013' AND station.long >= -122.226904
records.pred_sql:
SELECT s.id
FROM station s
INNER JOIN status st ON s.id = st.station_id
WHERE s.lat <= 37.481758
AND s.city = 'Redwood City'
AND s.dock_count <= 15
AND s.installation_date = '8/12/2013'
AND s.long >= -122.226904
AND st.bikes_available = 3
AND st.docks_available <= 12
AND st.time <= '2015-06-02 13:00:01'
